name: QUICKLOGIC CORP.  DL-,001
summary: QuickLogic Corporation is a fabless semiconductor company that develops customizable embedded FPGA (eFPGA) solutions and ultra-low power, multi-core MCU with eFPGA System on Chip (SoC). They offer solutions for various markets, including industrial, aerospace, and automotive. QuickLogic is headquartered in San Jose, California.
